creator: bf1783@googlemail.com
text:
On 5/27/11, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> The following reply was made to PR ports/157367; it has been noted by GNATS.
>
> From: Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org>
> To: jharris@widomaker.com
> Cc: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org
> Subject: Re: ports/157367: [PATCH] sysutils/file: update to 5.07
> Date: Fri, 27 May 2011 16:10:20 UT
>
>  Maintainer of sysutils/file,
>
>  Please note that PR ports/157367 has just been submitted.
>
>  If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
>  you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
>  and a committer will take care of it.
>
>  The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/157367


Ugh, I left some color codes in the patch.  I've attached a clean version.

b.
